label: USGS - Earthquakes > 5.0 magnitude
query:
SELECT place, mag, time
FROM earthquakes
WHERE mag > 5.0
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 20

label: USGS - Recent earthquakes in California
query:
SELECT place, mag, time
FROM earthquakes
WHERE place LIKE '%CA%' AND time > '2023-01-01'
ORDER BY mag DESC
LIMIT 10

label: NOAA - High temperature stations
query:
SELECT STATION, DATE, TMP
FROM weather
WHERE TMP > 25.0
ORDER BY TMP DESC
LIMIT 15

label: AWID - Strong signal devices
query:
SELECT wlan_sa, radiotap_dbm_antsignal
FROM wifi_network
WHERE radiotap_dbm_antsignal > -50
ORDER BY radiotap_dbm_antsignal DESC
LIMIT 10
